faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about Qotoof

q1.question: How do I create an account?
q1.answer: Click on "Sign Up" in the top right corner, fill in your details, and choose your role (Buyer, Vendor, or Driver). You'll receive a verification email to activate your account.

q2.question: How do I become a vendor?
q2.answer: After creating an account, go to "Become a Vendor" page, fill in your store details, and your account will be upgraded to a vendor account instantly.

q3.question: What payment methods are available?
q3.answer: We currently support Cash on Delivery (COD) and Credit/Debit Card payments. More payment options will be added soon.

q4.question: How does delivery work?
q4.answer: Once a vendor confirms your order, a driver is assigned to deliver it to your address. You can track your order in real-time through the tracking page.

q5.question: Can I return a product?
q5.answer: Yes, you can request a return within 24 hours of delivery if the product doesn't meet quality standards. Go to your Orders page and select "Request Return".

q6.question: How do I track my order?
q6.answer: Go to "My Orders" page or use the public tracking page. Enter your order ID to see the current status and estimated delivery time.

q7.question: Is there a minimum order quantity?
q7.answer: Each product has its own minimum order quantity set by the vendor. Check the product page for details.

q8.question: How do I contact support?
q8.answer: You can reach us through the Contact page, email us at Qotoof273@gmail.com, or call +212 674 841 248 during business hours.

stillQuestions.title: Still have questions?
stillQuestions.desc: Can't find what you're looking for? Contact our support team.

section1.title: 1. Information We Collect
section1.intro: We collect information you provide directly, including:

identity.label: Personal Identity:
identity.desc: Name, email address, and phone number

payment.label: Payment Information:
payment.desc: Processed securely by third-party providers (we do not store card details)

location.label: Location Data:
location.desc: Delivery locations, GPS coordinates for drivers

device.label: Device Information:
device.desc: IP address, browser type, device identifiers

section2.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
section2.intro: We use the collected information to:

connect.label: Connect Users:
connect.desc: Link buyers with vendors and drivers for seamless transactions

updates.label: Send Updates:
updates.desc: Order confirmations, shipping notifications, and delivery status

improve.label: Improve Services:
improve.desc: Enhance user experience, analyze usage patterns, develop new features

legal.label: Legal Compliance:
legal.desc: Meet regulatory requirements, resolve disputes, enforce terms

security.label: Security:
security.desc: Prevent fraud, verify identity, protect platform integrity

communication.label: Communication:
communication.desc: Respond to inquiries, send promotional content (with consent)

section3.title: 3. Information Sharing
section3.intro: We share your information only with other platform users necessary to complete transactions:

items.vendors: Vendors receive buyer shipping addresses for delivery purposes
items.drivers: Drivers receive pickup and delivery locations
items.payment: Payment processors receive transaction details (we do not store card data)

section3.noSell: We do not sell your personal information to third parties.

section4.title: 4. Data Security
section4.intro: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your personal information:

items.encryption: Encryption of sensitive data in transit and at rest
items.servers: Secure servers with regular security audits
items.rls: Row-level security policies on all database tables
items.ratelimit: Rate limiting to prevent unauthorized access attempts
items.testing: Regular penetration testing and vulnerability assessments

section5.title: 5. Your Rights

access.label: Access:
access.desc: Request a copy of your personal data

deletion.label: Deletion:
deletion.desc: Request deletion of your data (subject to legal retention requirements)

export.label: Export:
export.desc: Download your data in a portable format

optout.label: Opt-out:
optout.desc: Unsubscribe from marketing communications at any time

restrict.label: Restrict Processing:
restrict.desc: Limit how we use your data in certain circumstances

section5.exercise: To exercise these rights, visit your

section6.title: 6. Cookies
section6.content: We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your experience, analyze usage, and deliver targeted content. You can manage cookie preferences through the cookie banner at the bottom of the page or your browser settings.

section7.title: 7. Data Retention
section7.content: We retain your personal data for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide services. We may retain certain data for legal compliance, dispute resolution, or fraud prevention purposes. Location tracking data for drivers is automatically deleted after 7 days.

section8.title: 8. Contact
section8.intro: For privacy-related questions or to exercise your rights, contact us at:

notEligible.item2: Items damaged due to improper storage by buyer

section1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
section1.content: By accessing and using Qotoof ("the Platform"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use the Platform.

section2.title: 2. Description of Service
section2.content: Qotoof is a B2B wholesale marketplace connecting buyers, vendors, and drivers for the trade of plants, vegetables, and fruits in Morocco. The Platform facilitates transactions between independent parties.

section3.title: 3. User Accounts
section3.item2: Provide accurate and complete registration information
section3.item3: Maintain the security of your account credentials
section3.item4: Notify us immediately of any unauthorized access
section3.item5: Accept responsibility for all activities under your account

section4.title: 4. Platform Fees and Commissions
section4.item1: A commission of 3% on each transaction processed through the Platform
section4.item3: Delivery fees set by drivers based on distance and time
section4.outro: All fees are displayed transparently before order confirmation.

section5.title: 5. Orders and Payments
section5.intro: Orders placed through the Platform are binding contracts between buyers and vendors. Payment methods include:

section6.title: 6. Vendor Obligations
section6.item1: Provide accurate product descriptions and pricing
section6.item2: Maintain adequate inventory for listed products
section6.item3: Fulfill orders within the agreed timeframe
section6.item4: Comply with all applicable Moroccan laws and regulations

section7.title: 7. Driver Obligations
section7.item1: Deliver orders within the estimated delivery time
section7.item2: Maintain accurate location tracking during deliveries
section7.item4: Hold valid driving licenses and vehicle insurance

section8.title: 8. Prohibited Conduct
section8.intro: The following actions are strictly prohibited and may result in immediate account suspension or termination:

illegal.title: 8.1 Illegal Activities
illegal.item1: Using the Platform for any unlawful purpose under Moroccan law
illegal.item2: Selling prohibited, counterfeit, or stolen goods
illegal.item3: Money laundering, fraud, or financial crimes
illegal.item5: Engaging in activities that violate international trade sanctions

falseInfo.title: 8.2 False or Misleading Information
falseInfo.item1: Posting false product descriptions, prices, or availability
falseInfo.item2: Using manipulated or misleading product images
falseInfo.item3: Misrepresenting product origin, quality, or certifications
falseInfo.item5: Providing false identity or business information during registration

circumvent.title: 8.3 Circumventing Platform Fees
circumvent.item1: Attempting to conduct transactions outside the Platform to avoid the 3% commission
circumvent.item2: Using fake accounts or multiple accounts to evade fees
circumvent.item3: Manipulating order amounts or splitting orders to reduce commission
circumvent.item4: Encouraging buyers or vendors to deal directly outside the Platform
circumvent.item5: Using technical exploits to bypass payment systems

harassment.title: 8.4 Harassment and Abuse
harassment.item1: Harassing, threatening, or intimidating other users
harassment.item2: Using discriminatory, racist, or hate speech
harassment.item3: Sending unsolicited spam messages or advertisements
harassment.item4: Impersonating other users, staff, or authorities
harassment.item5: Sharing personal information of other users without consent

security.title: 8.5 Interfering with Security
security.item1: Attempting to hack, exploit, or bypass Platform security measures
security.item2: Using automated bots or scripts to scrape data or manipulate the Platform
security.item3: Attempting to access other users' accounts or data
security.item4: Interfering with MFA, session management, or audit logging
security.item5: Reverse engineering, decompiling, or modifying Platform software

section9.title: 9. Intellectual Property
section9.content: All content on the Platform, including text, graphics, logos, and software, is the property of Qotoof and protected by Moroccan and international intellectual property laws.

section10.title: 10. Limitation of Liability
section10.content: Qotoof acts as an intermediary and is not liable for the quality, safety, or legality of products listed or sold. We do not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free service.

section11.title: 11. Termination
section11.content: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms without prior notice. Users may terminate their accounts at any time through the settings page.

section12.title: 12. Governing Law
section12.content: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Kingdom of Morocco. Any disputes shall be resolved in the competent courts of Casablanca.

section13.title: 13. Contact
section13.intro: For questions about these Terms, contact us at:
